testcase.name: test_nyaa_last_uploads
testcase.failure:

testcase.name: test_nyaa_search
testcase.failure:
def test_nyaa_search(): request = Nyaa.search(keyword="koe no katachi") > torrent = request[0] ^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'coroutine' object is not subscriptable

testcase.name: test_nyaa_get_single

failure.message: assert False == True + where False = isinstance(<coroutine object AnimeTorrentSite.get at 0x108d898b0>, Torrent)
